shards.name: Shard of the Titan
shards.description: Titan's Slam creates a secondary shockwave that deals 40% damage.

shards.name: Shard of the Forge
shards.description: Fire skills gain +25% burn duration and leave a burning trail.

shards.name: Shard of the Storm
shards.description: Critical hits have 100% chance to apply Shock for 2 sec.
